hero.title: Sivastayım
hero.subtitle: Are you ready to explore the unique atmosphere of Sivas?

steps.title: Hittite Era (1600-1200 BC): The Birth of Sivas
steps.description: With key settlements like Sarissa and Kayalıpınar, Sivas is where the foundational codes of civilization were written. This period essentially formed the city's birth.

steps.title: Roman Power: The Majestic Sebasteia
steps.description: As a strategic heart of the empire, Sebasteia was a center of military and cultural gravity. Legendary stories like the 40 Martyrs emphasize its status as a majestic metropolis.

steps.title: Byzantine and Armenian Transition
steps.description: Serving as a crucial frontier city where empires collided, Sivas housed complex political transitions and powerful traces of the Vaspurakan Kingdom.

steps.title: Seljuk Golden Age: The Silicon Valley of Its Era
steps.description: Through monumental masterpieces like Gök Medrese and Şifahiye, Sivas experienced the zenith of science and architecture. It was the undisputed intellectual center of 13th-century Anatolia.

steps.title: Eretna & Kadı Burhaneddin: Capital Vision
steps.description: Rising independently as a state capital, Sivas entered a deeply intellectual golden age, guided jointly by political strategy and Kadı Burhaneddin's poetic and philosophical genius.

steps.title: Ottoman Centrality: Eyalet-i Rum
steps.description: Under centuries of Ottoman reign, Sivas acted as a colossal logistical and commercial base, pulsating as a critical administrative province at the very heart of the Silk Road.

steps.title: Republican Foundation: The 108-Day Capital
steps.description: Hosting the historic Sivas Congress that ignited the National Struggle, the city served as the temporary capital for 108 days, drawing the physical and spiritual map of the Republic.

steps.title: Modern & Future: Smart City Vision
steps.description: Crowned by the UNESCO heritage of Divriği and fortified by industrial milestones like TÜDEMSAŞ, Sivas now carries its deep-rooted history forward with an ambitious Smart City vision.
